name: Tradervue
description_short: Web-based trading journal with social sharing, detailed reporting, and broker auto-import for stocks and options.
description_long:
Tradervue is one of the original web-based trading journals, trusted by active traders since 2011. It provides a solid foundation of trade journaling, performance analytics, and sharing capabilities that have stood the test of time.

The platform supports auto-import from most major brokers and offers detailed reporting on P&L, win rates, hold times, and risk metrics. The Gold tier adds exit analysis, advanced filtering, and liquidity tracking that serious traders find invaluable for optimizing their execution.

Tradervue's social sharing feature lets traders publish selected trades for community feedback, which creates a unique learning environment. The free tier supports up to 100 stock/ETF trades per month, making it accessible for newer traders or those with lower frequency strategies.
pros: Free tier with 100 trades/month is generous
Established platform with proven reliability since 2011
cons: Interface looks dated compared to modern competitors
